text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Hanshin J.F., and Hishi Amazon
is feeling the pressure after seeing how ready and
formidable her competition is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But then, she remembers that her dormmates are
cheering her on—and she resolves to not let them
down.
